zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Leveson於1494年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾拉亞斯同時，她的父親Richard Leveson37歲，母親Hilary Willenhall33歲。她和James Collier至少有6個兒子和10個女兒。她去世於1544年在她的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Leveson于1494年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾拉亞斯同时，她的父亲Richard Leveson37岁，母亲Hilary Willenhall33岁。她和James Collier至少有6个儿子和10个女儿。她去世于1544年在她的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾史東。

nameMeanings.name: Leveson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu).

variants.name: Levison
meanings: English: variant of Leveson, from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu, from lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + sunu ‘son’).

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: Leverson
meanings: Altered form of Jewish   Levison   or   Levinson  .

variants.name: Lowson
meanings: 1 English, Scottish: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Low, a pet form of Laurence ( see Lawrence ) + -son. Compare Lawson , Larson , and Lorrison .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Leveson was born in 1494, in Ellastone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Leveson, was 37 and her mother, Hilary Willenhall, was 33. She had at least 6 sons and 10 daughters with James Collier. She died in 1544, in her hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Stone, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Leveson est née en 1494, à Ellastone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Leveson, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Hilary Willenhall, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 10 filles avec James Collier. Elle est décédée en 1544, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Stone, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Leveson 1494 in Ellastone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Leveson 37 und ihre Mutter Hilary Willenhall 33. Sie hatte mit James Collier mindestens 6 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb 1544 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Stone, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Leveson è nata il nel 1494 nel Ellastone, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Leveson, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Hilary Willenhall, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 10 figlie con James Collier. Morì nel 1544, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Stone, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Levesonが1494年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエラストーンで生まれた時，父Richard Levesonは37歳，母Hilary Willenhallは33歳であった。彼女はJames Collierとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と10人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1544年に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Leveson(이)가 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘라스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Leveson(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hilary Willenhall(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 James Collier(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1544년 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Leveson nasceu em 1494, em Ellastone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Leveson, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Hilary Willenhall, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 10 filhas com James Collier. Ela faleceu em 1544, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Leveson родилась в 1494 г. в местности элластоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Leveson было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Hilary Willenhall, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 10 дочерей от James Collier. Она умерла в 1544 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности стоун, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Leveson nació en 1494, en Ellastone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Leveson, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Hilary Willenhall, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 10 hijas con James Collier. Murió en 1544, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
